text: T-Mobile would be a great company if the money spent on advertising and marketing, was re-directed to providing a quality service. They spare no expense in duping the customer into thinking they are even comparable to Xfinity/Comcast. I am highly disappointed the last 4 days. They are costing people jobs.

During a phone upgrade that was only suppose to include an iPhone 13 mini, the advisor actually processed an order for an iphone 13 , tracker, tracker service, and 2 instances of device protections to my account. After finding the error they returned the incorrect order and sent the corrected order. However, they also never adjusted the bill so I was charged for 2 phones and all the services they said they cancelled. It took a total of 2 months and 14 calls to get any assistance and then when I got assistance they only returned 50 of 140$ in miss charges and acted like they did me a favor. Now I am stuck with them until I pay off the phone. They managed to turn a 10 year loyal customer into someone that despises tmobile/sprint. Avoid this den of thieves.
Worse internet, customer service! Identity protection, sucks ! Never come here

Pretty bad experience today. Went in to upgrade a line and was signed in and the guy said he'd be right with us. Then, he approaches the woman who came in AFTER us and assists her! We waited about 15 minutes and walked out. They called us about 30 minutes later stating they were ready for us. Why he couldn't help and skipped us 30 minutes ago, idk. We go back and sit down and wait. We watch 4 other team members assisting others and then they all disappear in the back. We waited about another 30 minutes and I asked the guy if one of the other 4 people in the back could assist us. He said no because one manager was on a call, the other manager was on break and the other person is new, so no and that they wouldn't be available for another 30 minutes. Why couldn't someone have stated how long the wait was going to be prior to us sitting there for an hour total between the 2 times we were there? Being skipped twice and overlooked doesn't make the customer feel appreciated. We'll go to another location to upgrade our lines and I'll be writing more reviews across other platforms, as well as emailing corporate.

Their customer service is almost non-existent. They are based in the Philippines and they have a script and, if you have a problem they are not prepared to deal with,  you get no service. They won't transfer you anywhere. They charged me for two months service after I had canceled my service. I finally got someone who understood my problem and credited me back for the two months. The next thing I know, I am again billed for those two months. I called and spoke to three different reps and they just kept saying that was for the two months they credited me for. Unbelievable!! I kept asking the rep to transfer me to her supervisor. She said she was not able to. Really??? I don't think so. She kept saying I had to call back. After waiting on hold for 1/2 hour, I was not going to call back again, only to get them again. I am still being billed for two months service after I had canceled. And, I could not speak to anyone who was able to do anything about it. I am so glad I canceled my service with them, but, beware, they will keep billing you after you cancel. I am still dealing with this.

I have been with T-Mobile for 6 months, after leaving Verizon for 15 years.  I was having coverage issues and though I'd come to T-Mobile. I have had problems with T-Mobile coverage, customer service follow-up..... Today, I was on the phone with a representative trying to resolve a signal matter, when the call dropped.  She never called back and it took me 3 hours to be able to resolve the matter.  In total, I spent 4 hours plus, to address an issue.  I'm not mad.  I just decided, I'll write this review and let others know that T-Mobile has failed at providing a good signal, customer service is lacking and I'll be going back to Verizon...  Worst decision I made was coming over to T-Mobile.  They clearly mis-lead into believing they had better coverage!!!!!!
Terrible customer service, when I ask a genuine question they keep trying to convert me into purchasing a plan from T-Mobile. Terrible customer service. Would never recommend.

Don’t use this company!  They have poor customer service!  To change a plan, I have to go online or over the phone and not in the store?  That’s stupid!  And to change my billing date, it will take 2 months and they have to split the bills so I have to pay it twice a month for two months?  All it takes is for the rep to hit a key to change it on a computer!!!  And , they can’t match other companies rates?  Obviously, I am leaving them!!!
Every person who works for sprint is a LOSER. The service sucks! Do yourself a favor and stay far away from this BS phone company

Here's what happened.
I had an extremely bad experience with these people.
It was so bad, They gave me a full refund when it was over but I had to wait.
A refund!
Now, months later they sent me a bill today for $145!
I only tried to use their ' service' for 1-2 days, but it was a nightmare. And nothing that would amount to a $145 bill.
I got on here to warn you. This is not a company you want to have to deal with.
And its been months since the whole thing was over, at least I thought it was.
I dont owe them anything, and here they are threatening my credit saying Im late. 😯 
When I signed up with them, I thought they would be better than most, but I was wrong, theyre even worse than Cricket.
How is it theyre sending me a bill?
This is wrong.

i am a sprint merger customer. t mobile very bad customer experience. had to pay off my lease of 200.00 because they said my 2 year old phone wont work on their network. b.s. second they only had one good phone in stock, a note 20 thats 1200.00 and a case 50.00 and a screen cover 50.00 and taxes about 2k to get everything transfers from sprint to tmobile. said i get free ear pods, they were out stock, was to be shipped to me, still nothing, i chatted for an hour, no resolution,   i really think im going to cancel tmobile and go to cricket, just a bunch of b,s,

Recently up graded 4 lines in my account. I was suppose to receive two 800 dollar credit and two 1000 credit when towards new phones when I trade in old phones. Store employee check phones said there were all good. Made purchases. A couple weeks later got email stating phones were defective, which they weren't. Then tmobile turns around and offers me 13$ for one phone 11$ for another. T mobile lied about promotions. They wanted me to pay full price for all 4 phones ( almost 4000$). No customer service rep could help just was a horrible experience. For whatever reason they could only return 2 out of the 4 phones I traded in. Just a really stressful situation the tmobile cause. This experience was so bad I decided to move on to Verizon.

customer service  is horrible, changed from sprint to T mobile  when sprint merged with T-Mobile incorrect billing and charges, I am the account holder , they are charging my brother eventho i pay the billing , extremely frustrate, called called customer service over an hour wait, still on hold, considering hanging to another carrier, really frustrated with the amount of time wasted

I've been using the Pre-Pay T-Mobile system for years, purchasing a bare minimum of time (2 hrs. only) for a cell phone I rarely use.  Tried to make a call yesterday, and received message reading "No Service."  Called T-Mobile, and was told my account had been "Canceled."  Not even close to the truth -- I never canceled my account.  Moreover, I'm the sole user-- so no one else could have done so.  WORSE-- the T-Mobile phone reps could not offer a single detail (date, cancelation order number or tracking number, etc.) corresponding to this so-called "cancelation of service."  Per phone reps, it's now on me (!) to get out to my local T-Mobile store to resolve this Cluster-F#*K  -of-a-T-Mobile-Nightmare.  Why so? Little wonder, that T-Mobile is the subject of several Class Action Suits.  Go For It, Folks.

Many T-Mobile customers report they can’t call Verizon, AT&T, or other T-Mobile, but T-Mobile has not publicly acknowledged an issue.
I been having difficulty with T mobile services, last time I  talked to a manager name abel and he can't  give a answer or a solution to my issue with t mobile,  they only want 2 thing: 1 charge you the complete bill even if you have no data services, that you phone just work with wifi but not with t mobile data service. 2 Even when they can't fix your problem they want from you to given then 5 stars and said that you're happy with the service that not work.. or they tripping with thc or they smoking lid because they're hallucinating.  T mobile are the worst in phone,internet, customer service and support services.
They trouble shooting every phone as one same brand,

Jesus christ if I could give negative stars. I started with sprint, who I thought was the fckn worst, but now t-mobile took their number one spot. I constantly drop calls, my messages never send, nothing EVER loads and phone lags and drops games and everything else you can imagine. It's literally an 800 dollar paperweight. Honestly I don't know why people pay contracts with these pieces of shet. Just get a throw away and pay 50 bucks a month for unlimited everything instead of dealing with idiot* who can't help you and tell you to do the same things over and over again. (And they never work) I'm tired of calling and driving to the store just to keep the shotty service I hve. Like what am I paying for? Cause obviously no one knows what they're doing. If I can cancel my plan, I will, and I'm not paying a dime more. They already upcharge anything they can so 🤷🏼‍♀️ fck t-mobile and fck sprint.

When we switched from Sprint we have had no service dropped calls can't receive calls and literally have called 50 times they tell us to do this and that while on phone for hrs and say it's fixed then next day we are back on phone then they say they will call us to see if it worked and of course we don't get the call and they leave a voicemail at this point we want out and a refund for all our problems this has been horrible

Tmobile mess up ur account make it hard for u to get refunds n credit on mistakes they have made. I made phone purchase in October they refunded me half my money today I never received my items I’m still being charged for them. Worst experience ever I’m switching tomorrow if they don’t fix this..it’s beyond ridiculous

One good review from people who worked with you TMobile and they were trying to be nice because they saw all of your customers complaining about your crappy service and customer service.  SMH !  My how the mighty have fallen.  What happened TMobile?  Where did you go wrong?  Why wont you do anything about it?  All the reviews are similar.  Read them.  I couldn’t believe my eyes.

edits.text: Ever since I was duped into buying a “5g” iphone 12 pro my service basically cut in half.  My phone shows 2 bars all day long.  I have a business where I need to access the web on a moment’s notice and I miss 3 to 5 opportunities per day due to their shoddy service.  Ive called on multiple occasions usually to wait on hold until i hang up but twice wgen I expressed my concerns the response I received is well just know if yiu want to stop your service youre under contract.  Are you serious TMobile?  This is your answer to crappy service?  Dont fall for TMobiles lies about super fast 5G. its a gimmic to sell phones.  Keep your phones until they no longer work.

text:
It’s been two months that we are in CA.  Reception is bad.  We have been complaining but no one cares.  Calls are constantly failing and disconnecting.
Even the calls to t mobile are failing.  The company is doing nothing to repair or to address the issue.  Never had such a bad example with any other carrier.
Do not recommend this company.

Just reviewed my T-Mobile billing to check my usage.  Usage has ranged from 6.60GB of data usage last Sept, 5.07GB October, 3.91GB November, and current data usage is 3.09GB through today, from 11/06/21.   The reason my T-Mobile data usage continues to decline is because I use WiFi a lot of the time when T-Mobile coverage is spotty at home and when away from home.   The reason T-Mobile has continually suggested I switch over to WiFi is due to their poor reception, only they don't label it as such.    The bars on my phone and iPad are usually 1 or 2, possibly 3, at home.  People mention they are unable to hear me on my IPhone 12Pro just purchased the first of the year.   When I was with Verizon, I had to switch to T-Mobile because Verizon coverage was spotty in the same location I'm in now.  T-Mobile had more bars of coverage .... think this was in 2014 or 2015.   Since then, T-Mobile has declined nearly each year.  Is this due to putting more priority on the development of their 5G network? I don't know and I don't care by this time.  I'm looking around....  and will also talk with T-Mobile again to see what their explanations are in 2021. Then will make a  decision about what I need to do.   My T-Mobile bill is way too high to be using WiFi calling all the time. I've been mentioning my cell phone bill to a lot of people, both in-state and out-of-state and they say Wow! That is way too high.  They pay $40-50-60.  My bill, less some devices I'm paying for, is in the $138 range.  T-Mobile's coverage quality isn't worth $138 w/spotty coverage.  I'm tired of hearing their "explanations" over and over again.  Spotty coverage isn't worth more than double what everyone else is paying, you know?

Called the support number . 
left my number for callback.
Got called back immediately only to hear music for more than 45 minutes .
Cant call certain numbers .
Dont know why and they dont have answers either .
Going back to Verizon .

I am a former customer. I had an account with you for 13 years and I  never had a problem . Now that you have merged with Sprint your customer service stinks.
I am 74 years old and a cell phone is very important to me. When I decided to bundle my cell and internet with spectrum, so I drop your service, you had the audacity to keep my phone locked and I  did not have phone service for three weeks.  I called you about it several times and got the same response, you will get back with me in three to four days. You never called me I always had to call you.
I finally was lucky to speak with a truthful CSR who explained that I had a new bill. The way I see it, you were holding me hostage until a another bill was generated. You had all my information for autopay. I feel that was a low down dirty scheme to ge more money from me. If you check my history with you, you will find I paid my phone off early and I always paid on time. You were much nicer before you merged. 
I am so disappointed in you.

Jonnie M Grant

Emergency. Call will not go through. I had to drive 50 miles in the middle of the night because I could not contact my mother. After getting there she had fell and could not make a call either not even 911.
I will see them in court.

T Mobil Port Angeles store: purchased a phone with a screen protector that they installed $45  No one mentioned guaranteed time, three weeks later the screen protector is coming off. They would not replace it so I had to pay $45 more. Did not give me a receipt OR my old protector which the will just get a credit for! Scanned my driver's license without my permission! This leaves a very bad taste... So my screen protector cost me $90! Never again. I hope the store goes out of business! Dave was my sales agent and the manager, crap

been with sprint since 2002 and now that is tmobil service is so bad I call trying to do an upgrade I spend 3 hours 58 minutes and 48 seconds on the phone and they still were not able to help me....so bad services

I have experienced nothing but inconvenience time and time again with this service. They fished me into buying a lower grade phone from what I had to begin, without letting us know it was a downgrade. We have nothing now but issues with this phone. We use this phone for business and cannot conduct our business properly with making a simple phone call to return a client's call. In order now to upgrade to a better phone once again, we are required to have to make another payment down. Ridiculous! Poor service! I would not refer a rat to their service!  Seriously thinking on filing a claim with this company!

Plainfield & Terre Haute.
 T mobile LIE & LIE AND, GET BY WITH IT ! LOOK @ ALL THE HORRIBLE REVIEWS 😧 CALL BBB ! THEM MORE PEOPLE THAT CALL. THE FASTEST WE CAN STOP THE MADNESS! ABSOLUTELY RIDICULOUS! IM SURPRISED THEY DON'T WEAR MASK & GUNS ! MIGHT AS WELL ! BECAUSE, THEY ARE LIE N AND, ROBING PEOPLE LIKE CRAZY ! # NEVER GO T MOBILE!

edits.text:
If you are Considering switching to TMobile. DON'T DO IT ! IT'S THE WORST SCAM I HAVE EVER SAW IN MY LIFE. BESIDES THE ELECTION.
They Promises you the moon. And, all you get is LIES ! Sold me a defective Device and, told me so. Said, we needed to swap it out. Because, Account holder was not there they would not do it. And, I was on the Account from day 1. We literally started having problems 2 days after getting phones. We got hacked. Our stuff was on dark web for sale 😮 Then we never did get 4th Phone 🤔 they said, No we just paid for a 4 th line and, activation & Insurance 🤔 Ok so, does that even make sense? Why would you get a 4th line and, pay for it and, Insurance with no Phone? Was supposed to be shipped. NEVER HAPPENED! The Defective Device was over heating. So, by the time I put my Sister on the Account for the 4th time. The Defective Device over heated and, Screen exploded 😮 Phone was still under warranty. But, because, the Screen exploded. They tried to make her file Insurance claim. 54$ 😮🤔was supposed to be 25$ a month for 2 new lines. One said, no 40$. A nother said No 35 $. Was supposed to get free Proxy Phone# up to 22 Device's. That was a lie. And, was supposed to get free iPad. That was a lie !
Long story short. DON'T EVER GO TMOBILE! READ REVIEWS!!! FIRST ! WISH I WOULD HAVE.
WE DROPPED T mobile and, Reported them to BBB.
SAVE YOUR SELF $ AND, BIG HEADACHE & HOURS & HOURS ON HOLD WIT T MOBILE. JUST DON'T DO IT !

text: My experience was awful from start to finish. I switched from Sprint and went to a store in the 34203 zip code. While there the Manager helped us, he pushed the sale of a BOGO Apple Watch… we didn’t need it, but being that it was free we thought it was a great deal. I asked several times if it was actually free because I thought it was a really good deal, I was reassured that it was. Moving forward there was a charge on my bill for an additional Apple Watch in which we went back to the store and called customer service to find that the watch was buy one get 1/2 off and there’s nothing that we could do at that time. The manager then told my husband to text him each month and he would give us a credit. That soon fell off and did not happen any longer within a couple of months. Upon reaching out to Tampa customer service I was informed that our bill was a mess and a very nice woman helped to sort it out the best that she could. She informed me that I should not go to that store again . I try to cancel my service two years later as we switch to Verizon. I was able to get all of the phone lines canceled and switched however not the Apple watches. I was told to contact customer service to stop that service from continuing. I contacted them  and sat on hold for over an hour. We went through the whole process I confirm that I wanted it canceled and then the phone cut out at the very end. I then find that I have a new bill for another $73 for the service that should’ve been canceled . I called again and was told they can I help me because I could not remember some code that I never set up. I was unable to get onto my online account anymore because we canceled the phone services. Therefore I couldn’t change that code. Then I was told I need to go back to the store. I went back to the store Several times and each time I went to a different T-Mobile customer service was trash. They do not acknowledge anyone upon entering the store. They didn’t even look at my direction. It appears to me that that is just a culture of T-Mobile store employees. Finally after waiting another 30 minutes that I didn’t have at another store I was greeted and upon explaining my situation I was told they did not understand why I was told to go to the store as the only thing that they can do is look at my account and help me pay a bill. I was instructed to call customer service again. So I called customer service again to go through the same conundrum. We are now two months later and I still have a service with these Apple watches that we have never used and I cannot cancel it. I am beyond frustrated regardless of their cell service being subpar, The customer service is atrocious. I honestly do not know how to cancel this service. And I’m assuming once I can finally figure out how to break the code I will have to pay for all this time… I would truly be surprised if that even worked out in my favor. Wish me luck… Verizon and AT&T are so much better steer clear of T-Mobile.
If I could give less I would.  The worst customer service ever.  They tell you one thing on the phone another in the store. RUDE RUDE and arrogant.  Have been a customer 5 years will be a new carrier

I often have to remind myself that I'm saving $20.00 a month. T mobile wireless internet isn't very good. 50% of the time it is so slow it's barely useable. TV will freeze up, web sites take forever to load or time out because they never load. If you need reliable internet this aint it. It is $20.00 cheaper than anything else here.

Do not use T-Mobile if you're in the Denver  area. I have spermatic reception and currently have intermittent reception. Every couple minutes I lose reception and can no longer use my phone for any internet related apps or programs. I also use T-Mobile home internet that I'm lucky to average over 1mbps (they promised 50 Mbps) and charged $50 a month. It's absolutely horrible service in every aspect. Please used At&t or any superior provider.

Tmobile....Tliars. The service is as bad as their lack of customer service, unless you like attempting to speak with "Bob" from India. I cannot explain how terrible Tmoblie is, there are no words for their greed. Why buy Sprint, only to isolate its customers and torture them? They weren't even compatible services! Tmobile argued that it was my phone & made me buy a new one. No change, other than more issues with the new phone & a larger phone bill.... F Tmobile ==============)~~~~~~

edits.text: Terrible. I wish Tmobile never got ahold of Sprint. Over six months of dropped calls and inferior streaming service. I was tricked into buying new phones to appease their new network. None of their "fixes" corrected their lack of service and now I am being told that I use their service too much. I have not changed my usage, but they have changed what I pay. I am switching services.

text: This is literally the worst company I have ever had the displeasure of doing business with the customer care Representatives have no clue what's going on they just do whatever the hell they want and tell you lies I have never been ripped off so bad by any company ever in my 37 years of life I hate this company so much and feel so passionately about it I'm going to write a bad review on every single website I can get my hands on and tell every single person I ever come in contact with T-Mobile sucks!!

T mobile is a nightmare, I spent over 18 years with them and had three lines of service with them , I needed to add a tablet to my account at the cost of 9.99 a month and was told because they haven't done a credit check sense I opened my account over 18 years ago they would have to do a credit check, I talked to the no customer service and they verified that in over 18 years I had never been late on a payment but would not add the 9.99 a month to my account without the credit check, I was paying cash for the tablet and offered to pay one year upfront and they said no(this on my end was a point I was making) I told them I would just walk out and go to sprint and was told ok, so I did and have been with sprint for over three years now with the same payment history...
Never a day late, now t mobile is taking over spring and going to a 5 g network, I just bought a cat phone less than a year ago for 499.00 and they now are telling me I have to sign up for a two year contract and pay 299.00 for the same phone I have because the phone I bought will not work on the network they are switching to.... Just got a call from the customer service asking me to pay the 299.00 for the phone and 1 minute before the call I watched a commercial on TV saying that they will pay off any phone from another Carrier up to 1,000 ! Really? All I can say is t mobile sucks like no other , I will be switching to another carrier, they have proven that they suck and have zero motivation to change the non stop treating people like crap! With that said take it for what it's worth,t mobile sucks! I own 4 businesses and have a credit rating of over 750 on all three reporting agencies! It the way they treat people and the way they do business that I will not out up with!

If I could put a zero I would. The customer service reps lie to you. They say they make notes, but they never can get back into the notes you have made. They say you have experts, but nobody is on the same page. I guess t-mobile is different with every representative you talk to. Do not put your faith in t-mobile it's definitely not worth it. Do your research. Customer service and tech support is very important.

TERRIBLE EVERYTHING! I have been with Sprint pretty much since cell phones became a thing, no matter the issues, I have always been loyal to my carrier. Until Now. I have been more than patient, but they are NOT Helpful at all, and continue charging us more than $300 per month for 3 phones we are unable to use. My mother's car broke down and she couldn't call anyone to come help her. Nobody in our family plan can make or receive calls anywhere in the verde valley area, unless we turn off our wifi, switch our cellular service to 4g, and stand still for the duration of the call.  But then, we have to turn our wifi on, while in a good service area, in order to send a text message. Our internet is virtually non-existent, unless we are connected to a paid internet service provider, and even then...we often experience the never-ending loading circle. Every time I call to complain, they connect me to what seems to be their equally unhelpful brother/sister, until you give up and hang up-which seems to be their ultimate goal.  I have been very patient, and understanding about their merge (which is when we started experiencing issues), but have been having this fight with them since May of this year! They refuse to do anything besides send me more sim cards, which do Nothing, while they collect my money for absolutely nothing at all. Most unhelpful, Unreliable company I have ever dealt with! I normally do not leave reviews, especially negative reviews, but this is ridiculous! If I could give them negative stars, I would.

On 11/20/21 I visited the T Mobile store number 6853 and received excellent customer service from Sales Rep # ****041. This representative was very professional and very friendly. Kudos to T Mobile for hiring such a high quality representative.

Unreliable service, deceitful “Experts”, total lack of communication amongst themselves. They built a brand new tower four blocks away from me a couple years ago and I’ve lost a total of four weeks of service while they try to work the bugs out. Ironically,  during the dozens of calls I’ve made, using local library WiFi to call them, they’ve asked me every time “would  you recommend us to your friends and family?” I’m a pretty passive guy but this time I said hell no. If I’m charged full price for this months bill, I will be returning to Verizon. Expensive but reliable

If I could put in a -5 for a review,  I would.  Waited an hour to sign up for a promo phone they didn't have.  When I got it, it was too big. So I called to find out the other promos. Two customer service " EXPERTS ", offered me a free I phone 13, ( a deal that didn't even exist). I called and another EXPERT told me that I was going to be charged full price for that phone, so I sent I back. Now I missed out on the original promo because I was sidetracked by misinformation...which is all recorded.
They won't offer to fix their mistakes so basically they screwed me out of a 700 promo. I am leaving T mobile next week...THEY SUCK!!

We went to the store to get new phone and change from sprint to T-mobile because of the merger. We were told we would get 800.00 off a new phone and they would give the what we owed on our sprint if we turned them in. Which is what we did. We were totally lied to. They did not for give the Sprint phones which we only owed $155.00 on and we paid $434.00 to up grade to iPhone 12 max. They won’t give our old phone back and now we are stuck we this a bill I’m not happy with. I wish I had looked at your rating before I signed up with T-mobile, I would have when to Verizon.

I went to a T-mobile store and inquired about switching from AT&T to T-Mobile.  I was very specific with the T-Mobile Associate that I wanted to move 6 lines from AT&T to T-mobile and trade in 6 iPhone 10X for 6 iPhone 13’s.  The T-Mobile Associate told me they could make the transaction.   The first 4 transactions went smoothly but when we tried to trade-in the 5th and 6th iPhones the transaction would not go through.  The T-Mobile Associate told me it was a glitch in the system.  After trying for an hour, they told me to go home and call Customer Service and they could complete the transaction.  They told me I’d have to pay for the two phones upfront but I’d be reimbursed on my phone bill over 30 months.  I called T-Mobile customer service and they informed me I could only trade in 4 phones.  I explained the situation to the customer service agent, provided them with the name of the T-Mobile assistant sales associate manager they told me they had no written record of what I was telling them, essentially the T-Mobile customer service agent said that I was lying.  They told me the only thing I could do was purchase the two additional iPhones.  I told them they should honor what I was told and they told me sorry but there is nothing they can do because they have to follow the rules.  I said as the company they have the latitude to make to correct things.  They were completely unwilling to help me.   Stay away from T-Mobile!

BEWARE!!!-VPN SERVICES WILL NOT WORK WITH THEIR 5G.
After moving a Samsung over from ATT (4g/LTE phone), I made the mistake of buying an expensive 5G Samsung, thinking my data speeds would improve. 
NOT SO!! After 3 months of troubleshooting with their technicians (and them telling me it was the VPN service) and the same amount of calls to the VPN provider (telling me it was the carriers issue) I find out from their 1 and only technician @ TMobile that the 5G Will NOT support the VPN service. So I have to run the 5G phone as a 4G/LTE network access now! No software is being run on the phone- only on the PC. The only thing the phone does is to provide a tether (USB/Internet access).
I tried to obtain some kind of credit for this mess (like some kind of refund credit on the 5G phone which cant be used for 5G)...and the answer was a resounding ....SORRY!
Think twice about going with this company and their sales pitch of 5G Wonderlust world of data access!
Very professional and competent service. Store is wll organized and managed.

what I was sold and what i got were not the same.  the promotions were not explained fully.  Did not explain how the trade in on phone and balance would be billed correctly and of course you get nothing in way of invoice or hard copy of what you bought.  Bill ended up being $25 more a month than quoted. Hate to sound negative but when I call c/s when the person has heavy foreign accent cannot understand a word this is SO FRUSTRATING.  Was looking up bill on app and accidently clicked to undo auto pay and called immediately to see about getting corrected...could not understand the woman and was told could not change back as bill was due...well, they sure did undo at the moment ....do not see why it could not be corrected.

edits.text: I am another one that got hood  winked into the scam in pricing...and how promotional phone pricing would be included in monthly price..started out $126..then $135..next $152...and nothing can be done to lower..if bring back 1 of 3 phones nor paying off the apple will lower bill..stuck for 2 years. WILL NEVER USE AGAIN

text: Went to a store in person, called in multiple times and waited 72 hours just to update a sim card.  First they changed the sim on the wrong phone number and almost caused major problems and then they say wait another 72 hours.  Everytime I call I get connected to another person reading a script with no insight or understanding to resolve the issue.  I would literally be better off just talking to the wall, same result.  This is insane.  Time to switch.

Terrible, Predatory, Deceitful.

Left for Google fi, couldn't be happier to not be trapped with a horrendous company like T-Mobile.

If I could give no stars I would. I had sprint/ t mobile, I went today because they were offering a free new I phone 13 and AirPods. I called the store and asked is the phone free and does that include the iPhone 13 pro max? They said yes it’s on all the 13’s. I go to the store and once again ask so this phone is free? They said yes. I spent an hour of them having to transfer me off sprint/ t mobile to just t mobile. First I asked is my bill going to change they said no well it did it’s more money now I lost my free Hulu I was getting and guess what the phones were not free. Now I was there 2 hours and I said if the phone isn’t free I don’t want it. So they changed  the SIM card in mine and my sons phone and guess what? Our phones don’t work. At all. Both of us use our phones for work. They said well if it doesn’t come back on in two hours come back. So now we both can’t work have no phones and this could have all been avoided with my original question “is this phone free?” Had they said no I would have a phone that works, my free Hulu, and my original phone plan that was $20 a month cheaper, and no loss of work pay for me and my son for an entire day. STAY AWAY FROM THEM

The service is already subpar and the customer service is even less. I recently had a issue with my phone and went into a local store. Only to find out it was a TMOBILE/SPRINT issue from the services that they merge so awfully. Then the tech who was working on my phone only made the situation go from bad to worse. He not only broke my phone even further. The promised a brand new replacement phone within 1/2 days I have currently not had a properly working phone for 7 days ( Through no fault of my own) I have spoken with numerous customer care agents thus far. Only for nobody to accurately handle the issue. They have went as far as to filing false insurance claims then customer service catching the flaws and cancelling it. The store manager who they claim name is KYLE Q. Supposedly up and quit after the issues were filed falsely/Inaccurately. I'm unsure if its ignorance or is this the most uninformed group of individuals that work for the  same company I have ever come across in my life. The online/phone customer care is no different. Due to all this failure they are now telling me it will be another 4-5 business for the issue to clear the customer care. I have been a customer since 2016 never even had to file an insurance claim. So Imagine what I have paid out in insurance alone. For the companies workers who are suppose to fix my phone to damage the phone to a point were it's unusable all in time for the holidays and they tell me I have to wait for it to be replaced. RUN the other way TMOBILE/SPRINT IS LIKE CATCHING COVID. You don't what the outcome is going to be. But you can only wish you didn't have it.
so mad and sad. Have been trying to make an online payment for my t mobile number, and the website’s button for one-time refill just doesn’t work. have been trying to pay for two hours now. fix it !!

I was a T Mobile customer for less than one month, and that was too long. I signed up for 5G Mobile Home Internet. The "coverage map" said my area was rich with 5G and should receive the best speeds. After setting up the internet, I was getting sub-3G speeds. They remotely tried everything they could and could not get a good signal on the device. I can forgive that, I know companies lie all the time about capabilities and coverage. I returned the device and was "Guaranteed" I would not be charged. Surprise! Was charged the next month. Called back, they could not even find my account anymore "since it was closed". They thought I was lying about being charged again. They again promised I wouldn't be charged, but did not refund me at first. Nearly a month goes by and I got a letter from a collection agency on behalf of T Mobile for 50 DOLLARS. Not only was I wrongfully charged, but they claimed they didn't get a payment they were not even owed. After calling customer service for the millionth time, I told them legal implications were next if the coercion hit my credit report. Ironically, they found my account and discovered they OWED ME money from the wrongful charge. As long as I am breathing, I will never give Trash Mobile another dollar. I highly encourage current customers to check their statements and bank accounts.

I don't know how this sniveling company took over sprints great customer care and ruined every thing about it.. their store managers are rude and extremely lazy. Especially  PEACHTREE CITY GA location the short little fat man has been several occasions when trying to solve small issues. the people on the support line, rude to me  they're overall customer support the worst in the industry. cant get anyone on the phone for support in America unless you call three times. honestly the worst cellular company on the market and i hope they get over taken by the 5c company because they over charge you and provide garbage service on all ends.. way to ruin a perfectly good system T-mobile. Bravo..also the 5g service is slower than 4g from sprint because unlimited is only after 20gs which in this day and age.. a week of using your phone if you use it for business you going m experience dial up internet after that. ill be returning my phone smashed.. I HOPE THIS COMPANY FOLDS

I have nothing but good things to say about Tmobile. I even switched my parents  over and they are saving over $60 a month! They also both got a free phone and costumer service was excellent  helping them set up their new phones . That says a lot since my parents are 80 years old. 
Almost all my family is using Tmobile  and we are all happy with our service 
Thank you Tmoble!
Keep up the great customer service!!!
Worst customer service in the world. They clearly dont care about customers which is why there isn't any company page to leave them reviews. They do everything wrong

With my resent experience with t mobile I do not recommend this company. We have been trying for months to get them to fix the issue we have had with are phones. We got cat s 62 phones because they were supposed to be good durable phones. Well NOT less then a week after we fot the phone. My husbands phone would just shut off in the middle of phone calls so we were told to do a warranty exchange, less then a week of getting his new phone again issues with his phone then my phone started to have issues. Again we did warranty exchanges with no luck. They phone we have now still have issues and we have been calling and trying to get help so that we could have working phones. We have been told multiple times that the phones are going to be taking off are bill and that we could keep the phones and go get new phones. We have called multiple times to fix this issue with no progress. I Cant stand how we can get told one thing and they dont go threw with it. Are have been setting in limbo wait so we could get working phones. Dealing with are phones shutting off and losing everything on the phone and not charging.  I would not recommend t moble.

I wish I could give zero star!

We tried T-mobile 5G tower internet service, but decided to not move with them.  It took me whole afternoon waiting on the phone to cancel the plan. It was within the grace period (2 weeks) they set. Then we got bill of 55.00. Now I am on another half day call!
Very Bad Customer Service, no help. Nothing, Never ever going to Buy a phone from t-mobile again

I will never suggest someone to go with T mobile, they never explain things clearly and later they charge u for nothing, I just got iPhone 13 pro max and they told me you only have to pay only 36$ a month and same time they deduct from me 100$ For sales and plus 101$ on bill, anyone who still want to go through T mobile make sure ask them about all charges just to make Sale they just lie

I had the best help from a representative named Nate is a representative named Nathan.. He helped me and his personality was so wonderful I wanted to leave a review he was very bubbly outgoing and very patient you have one wonderful asset on your team on your team T-Mobile. If I could call every time and have a bubbly personality like this I would never have a problem calling he took care of all my needs and was so friendly to go extra on helping me with my new device information he deserves a raise

Make sure to record the conversation when on the phone with a T-Mobile representative because they will lie to you to sell you products then charge you more later... Also don't call on Sunday night because you'll get the most incapable people ever (I'm being polite here)...
Waste of time, spent all day fixing their mistakes and service still doesn't work. Let's agents do what ever they want and no recourse.

I was shopping for a new plan.  My current provider keeps adding new charges and every month, you have to fight over your bill.  Its been 190 per month for 1 phone.   So i called tmobile.   The guy on the phone said we can sign you up today, and send you a sim card.  You will not have a bill until you activate it.  I Was paying my phone off so i could port it over and i double checked on no bill until i activate.   Money is tight and i cannot pay 2 phone bills.   He assured me that i wouldn't see any money out of my account until i had service.   So i moved forward with it.  About 15 days later, the full bill came out of my account.   I missed it that time.  The next month,  another bill came out and caused 70 dollars in overdrafts.  Keep in mind, i have not activated service.   I called and gave them the account number.   Since i didn't have a phone number, they couldn't do anything.   I had to go through the bbb to get this matter resolved.   
So some time has gone by and i decided to try one more time because of the price.   I paid my phone off before as instructed by tmobile.   I then go into the store.  The rep goes, we have a black fri deal.   We can give you 3 lines for 85 dollars.   I said 85 dollars in total.   Yes they said because our current black Friday deals.  It started today.  I can give you the credit for your phone or 1000 dollars in credit too.  Keep in mind, i owe 445.44 on my phone.  So i want the 1000 dollars.   They screwed up porting my number so the next day i went back.  The system was down and i was sent to another store.   The guy sat me down and said lets verify everything.   He went over what he had in the system.   What i agreed to and what he had in his system was not even close to what i agreed to. My bill was going to be 164 dollars per month, not 85.  My 1000 dollar credit didn't happen.   It wasn't even a thing.   By the way, the system was down the night of the sale.  They called into the 800 number to set up my account.   The rep on the phone sat there and listened to every lie he told me and said ok, lets set it up.   Now i have 6 people out of 6 people that lied to me plus 2 other sales reps and a store manager sitting with me and the sales rep.   I canceled my plan.  I don't believe dishonest people should make money from lying to the customer.   The man who helped me and was honest i called back to tonight.   My phone broke 2 hours after i left the store.   I asked if there was anyway for him to get credit if i signed back up with him.  He said it would go to the person last night.  I asked to speak to a regional manager about it and he made it clear that she didn't have the power to change that.  Because of liars,  i am going to stay with a known liar, but at least I know what the lie is vs a group that has lied at every turn.  Not sure how ethical the upper management is, but all 6 people i was talking to with the exception of the last guy would be fired.  The last guy is the kind of person i would do business with in a second.  Ps. The 6 i am about are the the 4 guys at the store helping this guy get a sale and the 2 on the phone.  I am looking into straight talk now.  I wouldn't trust a word they tell you.  The theme there seems to be say anything for the sale and you will be rewarded if they come across an honest rep that can save your business.

If I could give them a Zero I would. Athough I did have one very good customer service representive on the phone named" Bernard". Otherwise I have nothing good to say about this company , they blind side you to charge you more money and the in store service was not very good except one person that knew what he was doing named "Connor". I am switching back this week to the company I was with as this was a very BIG mistake and very time consuming. One week of stress..Don't do it !!
Can't just simply cancel wireless add-ons once added.  Have to physically call in and wait online for an amazing amount of time.  What a pain in the ass.

Terrible customer service staff very rude. One guy was nice however the rude ones take over and spend most of their time telling you why they can’t help you. 
I was with Sprint 16 years. I am not going to be with T-Mobile any longer. 
Phone customer service is just as bad.

Dont get a new phone with them. Your plan will be all messed up and you will be stuck cancelling because they wont unlock the phone until it is paid off. I have been a customer over 8 years and being treated like i am a first time customer. Customer service is horrible.  My bill  have been going up every month due to their errors. 
Pissed off customer.

Buyers beware! We started an account with T-mobile and transfered our phone numbers over to them. bought their phones, which only one worked. never did get the second phone, and located where they sent the replacement after getting it sent back also, and they have all the phones, because they never could give us the service we tried to get, we canceled   the service. We wrote themto cancel, we canceled through their support units and they still bill us. we had to stop payments one the auto pays. This was all in March of 2021, it is November and we just got another bill from them, Now I have to hire an attorney to sue them. This company needs to be shut down, permenently.

Absolute liars. 4 years ago I was sold insurance for my iPhone and they told me it would be completely free to replace if anything ever happened (First lie). Since then I've paid almost $1000 for the monthly payments on that insurance. Today I go in to use it because I lost my phone. They couldn't figure out how to access the insurance, so they told me to go home, and that I will have a deductible. He didn't know how much but he said if it was too much, I can come back and upgrade to iPhone pro 13 for $130 out the door (Lie #2). I ask him to turn on the 4g for my Apple watch so I can at least call people until I get a new phone. The last person said it was $5/mo (Lie #3) He says it's $30 today and $10/mo afterward. I didn't have a choice so I did it. He said it would be ready to go as soon as I pay (Lie #4), turns out it won't work until my watch reconnects to my phone. He promises me a $10 credit for the month since I can't use it (Lie #5). So I went home to do the insurance claim online by myself because they couldn't figure it out in the store. Turns out it's a $250 DEDUCTIBLE for a 5 year old phone. I'm pissed now, but whatever I'll just pay the $130 for a new one. I go back to the store, and it turns out I can only get the new phone for that price if I turn in my old phone. How am I supposed to do that if I don't have a phone, and he knew I didn't have a phone. This person is just smiling and being super condescending as if I was supposed to know this. I'm canceling my service after this. DO NOT USE TMOBILE THEY WILL LIE TO YOU!!!!!

We are extremely disappointed with Verizon.
We were offered a "great deal" to move from T-Mobile to their net work.
When we say a great deal in between quotes is because in reality it was the worst move that we ever made related to choosing a mobile phone provider!
Although we brought to Verizon business of six mobile lines what we have received from the store and from the overall conversations over 20+ hours with support entited erased the "great deal" that we were offered!
Although sitting uncomfortably at this Deerfield Verizon store a week ago today for about four hours we arrived home frustrated and the major phone line for our 501 (c)(3) nonprofit is still not working as we write this honest review!
Our foundation which depends on donations also via text messages has most likely lost $20-$25 on proceeds, Which are indeed very crucial to help the distressed pets that we undertake!
of course we're not asking Verizon to cover this loss because we do believe they would never do that anyway.
What are we want to point out here is that before you think about using Verizon for your phone lines or transferring your plan/s from other carriers to Verizon that you would please consider what is written here and either see for yourself or ask questions.
The "Customer Service" at this store on the day we picked our phone WAS HORRIFIC!
We did not walk out when we saw the lack of customer service because we were there with my family and my grandkids and we had taken that special time to transfer the lines and purchase new phones. If there was not for the situation we would not have staying there and we would have walked out right away.
We do regret that we did not do that.
since we went to that store seven days ago we have spent probably about 20 hours on the phone with Verizon support. We spoke most likely with 10 technicians or people that answer the phone S technicians. And none of them including the one we were talking to right now and has put us on hold was able to connect the most important line that has been transferred and ported over to Verizon. 
We do sincerely hope that the CEO of Verizon reads this with you and we welcome him or her to call us personally so that we can explain in detail what happened and what our frustration is. 
At times CEO's are very busy to take care of issues like that, which is very bad, but let's hope that Verizon employs one that DOES CARE!
We have a long experience in retail businesses and we have always strived to assembled the best team members along the way.We do have the experience of how true customer service should be! Or one provides Excellence or not!
We do have the experience of how true customer service should be.
Well Verizon's customer service should be scrutinized because we are certain that Verizon is losing business because of the lack of service, true interest in helping and WIT to making a difference.
May be Verizon does not invest on customer service, which if true, is a huge mistake! Phone service providers are the same, phones are the same, but what really differentiates both is  A CUSTOMER SERVICE OF THE UTMOST EXCELLENCE!

I spent 3 months trying to get our service working when I was told to find another carrier... They did a no service EIP. Well they kept screwing up but Everytime I called they promised it was fixed. It never was. After 9 months, I called for the last time about a promotion I was promised by telesales, a supervisor told me I didn't meet the qualifications and he refused to "give me a free phone" even though I told him times, dates names of the salesperson, promos, etc. He said he didn't care what anyone at TMobile promised, he wouldn't help me an I could pound sand. Please don't use this company, the customer service people seem awesome but they never call back when they promise to, they lie and do not care what the last person promised. They are the "un caring carrier". As soon as my new phone comes in I'm out.

This was the very worst experience that I ever had in my life, and I am 67. If it was possible to give a negative star, it would be a 5, I call that was pleasant, they gave me a Phone number , because I had a Apple Iphone,didn't need another. What I received the was, a slim card that did not match the phone # that was given to me, 2 boxes,each containing an Iphone and Ipad  You cannot call these people by phone, I used twitter to contact them. I had to print the return labels at the library because having no printer, I then had to take the item's to the UPS store to return then, The Charges were not removed from my credit card until 10 days later.  There service that was to be 5G, did not work in my area., as I was told it would. They wasted a day of my life, thought nothing of it.

edits.text: Very poor customer service, I told when too there website to sign up because of the poor reviews that were posted on the local store, Chatting on line with them, they check my Apple 12 making sure it wasn’t locked, them gave me a number and told me that I be getting a new SIM card and a free pad, I guess like an I pad, FedEx came leaving 1 box one day,SIM card didn’t match the phone number , next day another box, with SIM card and pad, I put that in my phone, the phone service started to take off, but the number didn’t match what I was told, in addition, you CANNOT reach these people buy phone, I had to use Twitter, sending direct messages, them they send me two emails with the return labels, I them had to go to the library to sign into my email account just to print the labels, having no printer, then drive to the nearest UPS store to drop them off, I wasted 7 hours screwing with these people because off what they did, No errors on my part. Best part was there was 3 different charges on my American Express card, one for each number I would never recommend T mobile to anyone. I now understand why you cannot review them on the T Mobile website

text: If I could give a negative star I would.  T-Mobile internet is the absolute WORST!  Don't do it to yourself.  I have been a customer for one month.  A customer service agent not only charged me a fee no one has ever heard of but they also credited my payment to someone else's account and suspended me for my trouble.  I spent 4 hours on the phone and it's still not resolved. I don't have internet and the agent says it's my repeater.  Ma'am, it's exactly what it says it is...it repeats your signal.  Ugh!!!!!  To add insult to injury, the app only works when you're connected to your home network.  Kinda defeats the purpose of an app doesn't it?  The modem is going back and I want my overpayment refunded.  I never leave reviews but they earned this one.  I am so disgusted.

I applied for an account with them. I was promised I would not be charged until I received my sim cards and activated them.  I never received them, yet I was charged the very next month.  When I told them I hadn't received them, they looked and noticed there was no activity since they were activated and I was told I would be fully refunded.  I was not.  They gave me a partial refund and continue to deny my request for full refund stating no more money is due.  I then received a bill where they intend to remove more money the next month.  Once I complained, I was told I would be refunded the balance.  I was not.  So what has actually happened is they went into my account and stole money from me and refuse to return it.  They are theives!  Even the bill I received said there was no activity. 0 data usage, 0 text messages, and 0 calls, yet they are stating that there is payment activity.  I would not recommend this company to anyone!  And I hope the corporate office reads this and sees that they have thieves working for them.
I want to thank to Felix for the excellent customer service

edits.text: Quiero agradecer a Juliet de Tmobile por el excelente servicio al cliente
Quiero dar las gracias a Duamel y Yesi por el excelente servicio al cliente

text: Should be zero stars. We had to switch from Sprint to T-Mobile. The support rep (through chat) was unable to help activate our three phones (myself and family). They transferred us to a more technical person, who dropped the chat. Got reconnected to a third person, who incorrectly set up the phones, so that my phone shows the same phone number as my son's phone. They are incapable of providing any useful assistance or knowledge.

T-mobile sucks, plain and simple.  The offer no customer support.  If you call it is always a 30 minute wait!  I am done with them.  Just to be clear, today I have had over 40 medicare spam calls and T-Mobile has done nothing to stop them, nor will they let me speak to a human being in cancellations.  Adios!  You will never see me back as a customer again.  Oh yeah, I have way more than one line.

So the rep I talked to today was  amazing. But the company itself is full of lies honestly. I became a customer Saturday was supposed to have my phone by now, which when I called yesterday I was told it would still be on time which was yesterday. And then today find out it’s gonna be like another week. When you and your website says 2 day shipping/delivery. People expect that. Especially people that took those 2 days off work unpaid to wait for a phone and will have to do it again? Why? Because T-Mobile is a disgusting and lame company and doesn’t actually believe in being honest. I should have known that since I worked for their insurance company Assurant. Both companies are careless and lie out their ass

Went to T Mobil 12012 Anderson rd Tampa Fl 33625 and found out those kids either are not well trained or they don’t care. 4 people on that store;the music is blasted. They did not help me to have my phone number changed. They are more attentive to their phones than the customers. I spent hours with customer service on the phone and nothing,  went to the store and stayed there on the phone with customer service and finally, the one guy on the store did what the first one, could have done, but either did not know or simply did not want to spend the time helping me. I’m 66 years old have purchased 15 cars in my life, those purchases were a lot easier than getting this service.  The last person I spoke in customer service told me to go to the T Mobil main store as the Anderson store is an approved dealer not the Mobil store. The owner of that store should check what is going on there and fix it. Should put cameras with sound.

I was happy with the service not as good as Verizon but ok, my problem started when I tried to get my IPad switched to T-mobile and they would pay off Verizon did all they asked except sending a screenshot something I didn’t even know was a thing. So 5 months later Verizon is still charging me monthly and late charges and T-mobile is saying no screenshot no pay, why couldn’t I send an email or bill instead of a screenshot, so their now not paying off the iPad because it’s over 30 days and I’m stuck in a contract another 18 months with this terrible company. Don’t fall for their lies of paying off a different carriers bill, they are of no help even though Verizon said they would drop my bill of almost 700 dollars if T-mobile  pays off iPad hopefully they will make me the same offer. Just stay away from T-Mobile  and their lies.
Don’t do it. No matter how good it sounds DO NOT DO IT !!

started as new customer on 10/23. Iphones were ordered. After several dropped calls I made a call to tech support and then she canceled my order. Moved to back of the list. I had to call to receive the credit and was promised that she would credit my account but had to cancel my phones and get bumped to the back of line again. Finally, when the phones shipped and stated delivered, no UPS came to my door or left a package. Had to cancel again. NEXT shipping date is not until December 15.Must be a reason that this is happening and its not because I don't need a phone. Looking elsewhere!

One of the worst ways to stat a relationship with any one is based on lies. I ordered a device on 11/9/2021 and selected 2-3 business day delivery. Upon paying for the item and completing the order, I was informed that it will arrive between November 16th-22nd. No where on the website did it specify such a delay. I called T-Mobile last week and complained and was told that the order will be shipped immediately and expedited so that it can arrive sooner than the 16th of this month. Well, today is the 15th and upon finally receiving a confirmation email with tracking number - order will now arrive on the first given date. I called T-Mobile today and explained the situation asking if there is any way for them to expedite the phone based on their promise - guess what I was told …no. So they basically lied.... What a way to start a relationship VERY DISPPOINTED.
Id give zero stars if i could. Worst promotion for a phone. Do not listen to sales reps i honestly cant believe how badly i was overcharged and uninformed about my account.

Nothing but a bunch of crooks. Was told my bill was going to be 144 a month. First 2 months 152 and 144. 3rd moth 177. Called customer service spent 45 or so minutes on the line. Ended up speaking to a supervisor who brought it back down to 144. She told me was fixed and never would have to call again. Next moth same 177 call fixed to 144 told never have to call again. Following month 177. Call, this time after over an hour talking to the guy. Was informed that not only did the guy that sold us the plan lied but the supervisor then a nother employee all lied to me. So, the store lied to make a sale. That was fraudulent from the lies to manipulate me into signing a contract. Then instead of the supervisor telling me the truth. She furthered the lie along. Same with the 3rd person. Going to report this to the BBB.

UPDATE: I spent another Saturday on hold for 3 hours with T-mobile only this time I got to talk to Mr. Big. The Boss. The Head Honcho of his particular department and this time I got results! Another apology and promise of a refund! 
Then yesterday we received a letter from a collection agency demanding $34.67 on behalf of T-mobile.We switched from t-mobile in may but they withdrew another payment in June. I spent an hour on the phone straightening it out and they apologized and said we'd have a refund in a week. In July they took another payment and there was no refund. Another hour on the phone, another apology and promise of a refund. August, no refund, another charge and another hour on the phone. September: Same thing. Same in October too. Today Ive been on the phone with them for about 3 hours so far, the last 2 on hold waiting for an elusive supervisor who can apparently make everything right but can't make a phone call when he's done so I have to sit here on hold for an indeterminate number of hours. To fix their mistakes.

I bought a $300 Inseego 5G hotspot before moving across the country, and could not return it within the 14 day period. T-Mobile has an extensive system of red tape that will keep you busy meandering around it for days, then tell you it's too late to return the product. The device did not work in my new location, and a local store would not accept it saying that I had to return to the "original" store 2000 miles away. When I called that store, they said they couldn't accept it by mail and that I should call the 800 number. The 800 number said that it had to return to one of the stores because it was an online purchase. After 30 days of circular BS, I gave up and now it's a nice paperweight on my desk. Never again T-Mobile!

If I could give negative Stars I would. On all their advertisements they boast that they are the best service and most coverage that there is. We switched to T-Mobile and our phones work nowhere. Throughout Minneapolis around Minneapolis all the way through Minnesota dead spots everywhere. I feel like we went back to the year 2000 with their service. I highly highly highly recommend stay away from T-Mobile.

Switched from sprint because of their lies and false promises. Worst decision ever. Customer service is horrible. Store employees says have to call customer service. Wait on hold for half an hour to be transferred around to different people who cannot help only to have call dropped. Call back and they say they can’t do  anything go to store.
Go back to store and employees cannot help. Ask to see manager. They don’t know when he will be there but think he will be in the middle of next week.
One star is to good of a rating but wouldn’t let me do zerp

I have been with Sprint for over 20 years and now that we have been switched T-Mobile, it is the very worst service I have ever experienced.  I am switching to AT&T (which has the worst customer service) but not as bad as the service I am receiving right now.  My bill is over $600 for two months.  I have been complaining for over 2 months and no one helps.  I am reviewing the account for upwards of 12 minutes is so ridiculous, then coming back and saying I am cancelling your service is even worst.  All I want is to get charged and additional $10 per line (ipad/watch) per month and not half of my mortgage.  I am now on hold w/ my 3rd person and he has been reviewing my account for 12 minutes (unbelievable).

Biggest frauds on the face of the planet!! Charging my mom for someone else’s account!! She’s almost 80!! What a scam and you don’t answer your phone. Cowards!! You know you’re crooks! Your service is crap!! You suck at customer service. Go Away!! You Suck!!
Very spotty service. Even at the Austin airport that one has to rely on the airport WiFi in order to text!!! Not to mention in lots of remote places without any service. Very disappointed.

This company keeps sending me text messages about my service with another company and how T Mobile is retiring my phone and a bunch of other stuf My carrier says no worries that T Mobile is going to retire my phone that just came out 3 months ago as they can’t do anything. T Mobile even offered me a deal on a new phone. I find their business practice of lies and deception to be a big negative and so should you.
If they don’t soon stop messaging me I will be filing a harassment suit against them as my phone goes off all hours of the day and night everyday. Calling them doesn’t work, maybe a lawyer will get their attention

We have been with Sprint and Sprint told to T Mobile and the difference in service and accurate information and games with the phones and deals...wow, night and day. Sprint was good. TMobile is terrible. Sprint was a more honest, less games. T mobile is almost always games and complications and customer service that doesn't know what they are talking about. I spoke three times about ugrading and each rep gave me a different story and a differnt price. I ask them to make notes so the next time I call, i don't have to be told differently and each time, no matter what...each time the price changes, the deal i was quoted was incorrect and the inevitable "I'm sorry sir." They suck. My experience is they say one thing on the phone, but it's not in writing..you get something else and it just keeps changing and the confusion is epic. Bottom line, where is the government protecting us from these types of business practices?  They record the calls yet they do not use the notes or the recorded calls to confirm the last reps offer! I'm two hours on the phone trying to upgrade because 3G phones are being discontinued..yet, they insist on a return of the old phones with all kinds of stipulations that they are in "good working order" Why do they want the old phones back in good working order if they are discontinuing the network. Bottom line, T MOBILE is far from a good company...it's more of big business that needs serious regulation especially since we all need cell phones now-a-days for text from State or Bank or Financial...we all need them but the companies get away with crookery in my opinion.

T-mobile is Sprint now don't think that T-mobile is not behind the new tactics sprint has with your fully paid off devices they don't want you to have, a big and clear action Lawsuit will solve this problem people, get rid of T-mobile the one hiding behind sprint background curtain.

Oh where do I begin. Each month my plan kept increasing. Called customer service several times and was able to reduce some charges however it continued to increase.

In March 2021,I got 2 new phones, paid off an old phone installment and canceled a line. Low and behold the bill still increased. Call CS they said no other line was on, accounted the charges to taxes and fees. After an almost $300 bill for 3 lines and no international calls. I decided to comb thru the charges line by line. Behold, Tmobile never canceled the line, AND added FEES to the line. Then to add insult to injury told me the time was out of the query window so they only credited back $87 for a line canceled in March.

I pay over $355 a month for 3 phones 2 of which we own.  My phone stopped charging and the battery burst so filed a claim.  Phone has no damage caused by me but I'm forced to pay $99 for a replacement and have no phone for 3 days.  They need to provide phones for their crappy $1200 phones if they aren't going to honor the next day shipping that their insurance promised.  Never had this issue with Sprint.   Absolutely crap service.   Looking for a new phone service.  Verizon is looking pretty good right now.

I called to ask if there was anyone who could help me resolve my connection problems and was directed to a voicemail that was 'full'and then call ended. I called back and they said there was nothing anyone could do. I am trying to play Call of Duty with 199-365MS ping it makes me want to club a baby seal over the head. How disappointing that if you have a problem then to bad. Unless you want to buy a new phone I'm sorry there is nothing we can do for you. I am not mad I am just sad😔

edits.text: I have 4g and live in Oregon. It is by far the WORST network I've ever dealt with. It doesn't matter where you are the service is 1 maybe 2 bars. I can't even use my internet because nothing will load. I get a new sim card after tech. support recommends that for ten dollars. It did nothing to improve my connectivity. I've done everything in my power to optimize my phone to its highest peak of performance. Still no help. But if I go to a public place and use wifi it works fantastic. Don't trust this scandalous corporation. WORST CONNECTIVITY I'VE EVER DEALT WITH.

text: I have been a mobile customer for 18+ years and really ask for much just amazing service (which it has not been) to get through day to day.  For the past 2 weeks I have been trying to get my SIM card to activate on a iPhone 12 purchased from an Apple store (unlocked) and my SIM card would not activate so I said hey it has been years since I got a new sim I’ll do that call they send a new sim problem solved right ?  No, the same issue with the new SIM card so I check my phone eligibility just for poops and giggles and it is ready and able to work on Tmobile network but again new sim same problem.  I have called in a total of 5 times to get this fixed and each time I was never transferred to a supervisor or given a level of service that can really help with the problem.  Tomorrow I will be contacting Verizon to port my numbers over and using my phone that i Bought out right to work with their company and coverage.  18+ years of me paying for a service and you can’t give me a unlocked SIM card to work with my unlocked phone TMOBILE IT IS THE SIMPLE THINGS THAT KEEP CUSTOMERS AND YOU CAN‘T EVEN GET THAT RIGHT

As of today I will no longer be with T-Mobile once was a big enough sh!t show for me... charging me for a phone I paid cash for & days of not having service, customer service didn't know anything and none of them wanted to help figure out why I'm being charged for a phone I already paid for.
Worst phone company I've ever had. 💯

I'm not even a customer they just had me on hold for 45 minutes just trying to get off their advertising list. Then they want to make me another offer, then their opt-out website "fails to load" after I hit submit.
